description: Cross-driver statement-chunker conformance fixture. Every driver's statement splitter MUST reproduce `expected` exactly for each `input`. Honors the SET TERM client directive (consumed, not emitted, not counted) and quote-aware splitting on the active terminator. See README.md.

cases.name: set_term_procedure_body_inner_semicolons
expected: CREATE PROCEDURE p AS BEGIN x = 1; y = 2; END

cases.name: set_term_with_leading_comment
cases.input:
-- define trigger
SET TERM ^ ;
CREATE TRIGGER t AS BEGIN INSERT INTO a VALUES (1); END^
SET TERM ; ^
expected: CREATE TRIGGER t AS BEGIN INSERT INTO a VALUES (1); END

cases.name: set_term_multichar_terminator
expected: CREATE FUNCTION f AS BEGIN RETURN 1; END

cases.name: terminator_char_inside_quotes_not_split
set_term_directives_not_counted
expected: CREATE PROCEDURE q AS BEGIN SUSPEND; END
